name: Tear of the Goddess

passives.name: Manaflow
passives.effects: Grants a charge every 8 seconds, up to 4 charges. Affecting an enemy or ally with an [[champion ability|ability]] consumes a charge to grant {{as|3 '''bonus''' mana}}, increased to {{as|6|mana}} if they are a champion, up to '''maximum''' of {{as|360 '''bonus''' mana}}. Can only be triggered if an ability was cast and only once per {{tip|cast instance}}.

passives.name: Helping Hand
passives.effects: Basic attacks deal {{as|5 '''bonus''' physical damage}} [[on-hit]] against [[minions]].

effects_structured.raw: Gain a Manaflow charge every 8 seconds, up to 4 charges.
Affecting an enemy or ally with an ability consumes a charge to grant bonus mana (3; 6 vs champions), up to 360 bonus mana, once per cast instance.
Basic attacks deal 5 bonus physical damage on-hit against minions.

simpleDescription: Increases maximum Mana as Mana is spent

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Tear of the Goddess Manaflow is modeled as ability-affect gated stacking: mana gain resolves when an ability affects a unit, not on cast button press alone.
Execution semantics note: Manaflow is charge-gated (8-second cadence, max 4 charges) and limited to one trigger per cast instance for ability-based events.
Shop sell value was corrected to Tier-1 canonical dataset/page values during manual review.
